Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-12505 affecting package cifs-utils for versions less than 7.6-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-12505 affecting package cifs-utils for versions less than 7.6-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package cifs-utils is earlier than 7.6-1, affected by CVE-2026-12505
